creator: pali.gabor@googlemail.com
text:
Gabor PALI wrote:
> Marc Fonvieille wrote:
>> On Sat, May 17, 2008 at 03:57:02PM +0200, Gabor PALI wrote:
>>>> Number:         123762
>>>> Category:       docs
>>>> Synopsis:       [patch] Add Missing Developer PGP Keys to the Handbook
>>>> Confidential:   no
>>>> Severity:       serious
>>>> Priority:       medium
>>>> Responsible:    freebsd-doc
>>>> State:          open
>>>> Quarter:        
>>>> Keywords:       
>>>> Date-Required:
>>>> Class:          doc-bug
>>>> Submitter-Id:   current-users
>>>> Arrival-Date:   Sat May 17 14:00:08 UTC 2008
>>>> Closed-Date:
>>>> Last-Modified:
>>>> Originator:     Gabor PALI
>>>> Release:        FreeBSD 6.3-STABLE i386
>>>> Organization:
>>>> Environment:
>>> System: FreeBSD disznohal 6.3-STABLE FreeBSD 6.3-STABLE #4: Fri Apr 4 23:29:43 CEST 2008 dezzy@disznohal:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC_ i386
>>>
>>>> Description:
>>> 	I found that PGP keys are missing for many FreeBSD developers in the
>>> 	FreeBSD Handbook, Appendix D. ``PGP Keys''. The .key files and the
>>> 	SGML entities associated to them are already there, but they are not
>>> 	referenced in the SGML sources. Maybe it is because there was a
>>> 	documentation bug in the Committer's Guide (doc/122917) and many
>>> 	committers did not update the corresponding file.
>>>
>> Some of them left the project (hence their absence from the appendix),
>> there's no reason to add them.
>>
> 
> I see. I will check the status of every affected developer and re-send
> this patch.
> 

Here is a list of the active developers who are missing:

Username  Real name           Area(s)    Commit bit(s)   Last Activity

araujo    Marcelo Araujo      ports      2007/04/26      2008/05/17
bms       Bruce M. Simpson    src        2003/08/06      2007/07/09
daichi    Daichi Goto         ports      2002/10/17      2007/10/22
dryice    Dryice Dong Liu     ports      2006/12/25      2008/03/17
grehan    Peter Grehan        src        2002/08/08      2008/01/31
jadawin   Philippe Audeoud    ports      2008/03/02      2008/05/17
laszlof   Frank Laszlo        ports      2006/11/07      2007/10/07
lofi      Michael Nottebrock  ports      NO INFO         2008/04/05
maho      Maho Nakata         ports      2002/10/17      2008/05/17
mm        Martin Matuska      ports      2007/04/04      2008/05/16
sepotvin  Stephane E. Potvin  src        2007/02/15      2007/06/13
syrinx    Shteryana Shopova   src        2006/10/07      2008/04/06
